mapper.insert: INSERT INTO outbox_message ( id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, payload_jsonb ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{aggregateType}, #{aggregateId}, #{eventType}, CAST(#{payloadJson} AS jsonb) )
mapper.select: SELECT id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, CAST(payload_jsonb AS TEXT) AS payload_jsonb FROM outbox_message WHERE id = #{outboxMessageId}
